message:
Running command: # Check if process has actually progressed (CPU time increasing?)
cat /proc/625425/stat 2>/dev/null | awk '{print "utime:", $14/100, "stime:", $15/100}'
echo "---"
# Check if there's any mmap'd odb file
cat /proc/625425/maps 2>/dev/null | grep -c odb || echo "0 odb maps"

function.arguments:

function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
# Check if process has actually progressed (CPU time increasing?)
cat /proc/625425/stat 2>/dev/null | awk '{print "utime:", $14/100, "stime:", $15/100}'
echo "---"
# Check if there's any mmap'd odb file
cat /proc/625425/maps 2>/dev/null | grep -c odb || echo "0 odb maps"
